title: CIS Tier Tagger
description: Shows player tiers from CIS Tiers directly in Minecraft
body:
# 🏷️ CIS Tier Tagger

CIS Tier Tagger is a lightweight utility mod that integrates with the CIS Tiers ranking system used by the CIS PvP community.
It automatically detects and displays a player’s tier in their selected kit, and lets you view all kits where a player has a rank — right from the game.

## ⚙️ Features
**✅ Player Tier Display**
- Shows the player’s tier in their selected kit directly on their nametag

**💬 Tier Info in Chat**
- View all kits in which a player has a rank using a simple in-game command

**🔁 Automatic Kit Selection**
- Automatically sets your kit based on the tier displayed in your nametag



## 💻 Commands

```/cistagger <name>``` - displays player's tiers in the chat

```/cistaggerset <kit>``` - set the kit based on the player's tier shown in their nametag.

```/cistaggerreload``` - reloads the mod


## 📂 Contributing

🔗 GitHub Repository: [CisTierTagger](https://github.com/DressedHorse/CisTierTagger)

Open for contributions and feedback — feel free to submit PRs or suggestions! 🤝

## 🧠 Requirements

>  Fabric API
